title: Arena Feature Flags & Configuration Extension
goal: Extend the existing config module to load and expose arena-specific feature flags (feature_arena_elimination, feature_arena_metrics_panel, feature_arena_cost_display) from .env, with documented defaults and boolean parsing.

in_scope: Add feature_arena_elimination flag to config loading (default: false)
Add feature_arena_metrics_panel flag to config loading (default: false)
Add feature_arena_cost_display flag to config loading (default: false)
Parse boolean strings from .env (true/false, 1/0, yes/no) consistently
Return feature flags as part of the config dictionary
Update .env.example with new arena feature flag entries and descriptions
Ensure disabled flags result in zero arena-specific UI rendering
out_of_scope: Inspector or persistence feature flags (Week 2/3 scope)

inputs: PRD Week 1 section 4 — Feature flags requirement
outputs: src/config.py — updated with arena feature flag loading
.env.example — updated with arena feature flag entries
checklist: Add a _parse_bool(value, default) helper function in config.py that handles true/false/1/0/yes/no strings
Read FEATURE_ARENA_ELIMINATION from os.environ and parse as boolean (default: false)
Read FEATURE_ARENA_METRICS_PANEL from os.environ and parse as boolean (default: false)
Read FEATURE_ARENA_COST_DISPLAY from os.environ and parse as boolean (default: false)
Add all three flags to the config dictionary returned by load_config()
Update .env.example with FEATURE_ARENA_ELIMINATION=false entry and comment
Update .env.example with FEATURE_ARENA_METRICS_PANEL=false entry and comment
Update .env.example with FEATURE_ARENA_COST_DISPLAY=false entry and comment
Verify that missing flag env vars resolve to their documented defaults without error
acceptance_criteria: load_config() returns dict with keys: feature_arena_elimination, feature_arena_metrics_panel, feature_arena_cost_display
All three flags default to False when not set in environment
Setting FEATURE_ARENA_ELIMINATION=true in .env results in config['feature_arena_elimination'] == True
Boolean parsing handles case-insensitive values (True, TRUE, true, 1, yes)
.env.example documents all three flags with clear descriptions
Existing config keys (endpoint, api_key) remain unchanged
Flag defaults are deterministic and documented
review_focus: Boolean parsing is robust and handles edge cases (empty string, whitespace)
Flag names in .env match the config dictionary keys by consistent convention
No breaking changes to existing load_config() return structure
Default values align with PRD specification
risks_or_notes: Convention decision: .env uses UPPER_SNAKE_CASE while config dict uses lower_snake_case — maintain consistent mapping
Consider extracting _parse_bool to a shared utility if more flags are added in Week 2/3
Empty string for a flag should resolve to the default (false), not raise an error
definition_of_done: src/config.py includes arena feature flag loading with boolean parsing
All three flags resolve correctly from .env values
Missing flags default to False without errors
.env.example includes all new entries with descriptions
Existing config functionality is not regressed
